revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:1 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:1月23日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 1월 23일]][[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:正月廿三]][[zh:正月廿三]]
{{Not to be confused with|January 23|qq=January 23}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=一月廿三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 1월 23일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar January|qq=}} '''January 23''' is the 23rd day of the month {{ill|Zhengyue|en|Zhengyue|qid=Q1072983|lt=January (Mutsuki)|1=Zhengyue}}, the 1st month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the day is designated as {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * In the 2nd year of the Kenryaku era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1212|en|1212|qid=Q5255|lt=1212|1=1212}} {{ill|February 27|en|February 27|qid=Q2361|lt=February 27|1=February 27}}) – Hōnen issued his will ("{{ill|One-Sheet Document|en|One-Sheet Document|qid=Q11352846|lt=ichimai okishōbun|1=One-Sheet Document}}") to his disciple Minamoto no Satoshi.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-02|qq=}}</ref> * In the 1st year of the Genki era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1570|en|1570|qid=Q6659|lt=1570|1=1570}} {{ill|February 27|en|February 27|qid=Q2361|lt=February 27|1=February 27}}) – Oda Nobunaga submitted a memorandum containing his Five-Article Proposal to Ashikaga Yoshiaki. * In the 2nd year of the Keiō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1866|en|1866|qid=Q7712|lt=1866|1=1866}} {{ill|March 9|en|March 9|qid=Q2401|lt=March 9|1=March 9}}) – During the Sakamoto Ryōma attack incident, Sakamoto Ryōma and others staying at Fushimi and Teradaya were ambushed by the forces of the Fushimi Magistrate. * In the 11th year of the Bun'ei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1274|en|1274|qid=Q5527|lt=1274|1=1274}}) – The Genkō Rebellion ended when Daikoku Masahiro withdrew his troops from Suō Province.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * In the 1st year of the Kōji era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|220|en|220|qid=Q30866|lt=220|1=220}} March 15) – Cao Cao, a military commander of the Wei state during the Three Kingdoms period (birth year unknown).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|1|22|1|24|12|23|2|1|0123|qq=}}
== References == {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|1月23日 (旧暦)|version=104061168|comment=Imported full ja history}}

[[ko:음력 1월 23일]] [[ja:1月23日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:正月廿三]]
[[ar:January 23 (Lunisolar)]]
